recommendations.title: The Hudsucker Proxy
recommendations.overview: A naive business graduate is installed as president of a manufacturing company as part of a stock scam.

recommendations.title: Chhichhore
recommendations.overview: Following a group of friends from university as they progress into middle-age life and go their own separate ways.
Two university students gain insight into life and love as they get to know each other during a road trip across Europe.

recommendations.title: Bachelorette
recommendations.overview: Three friends are asked to be bridesmaids at a wedding of a woman they used to ridicule back in high school.

recommendations.title: Rang De Basanti
recommendations.overview: After a group of friends graduate from Delhi University, they listlessly haunt their old campus, until a British filmmaker casts them in a film she's making about freedom fighters under British rule. Although the group is largely apolitical, the trag

recommendations.title: Rocket Singh: Salesman of the Year
recommendations.overview: Rocket Singh: Salesman of the Year is the sometimes thoughtless, sometimes thoughtful story of a fresh graduate trying to find a balance between the maddening demands of the 'professional' way, and the way of his heart - and stumbling upon a crazy wa

recommendations.title: Camille
recommendations.overview: A twisted honeymoon adventure about a young couple on their way to Niagara Falls.

recommendations.title: One Small Hitch
recommendations.overview: On a flight home to Chicago for a family wedding, childhood friends Josh and Molly innocently agree to fake a wedding engagement to make Josh's dying father happy. Things quickly get out of hand with their two boisterous families, and a series of eve

recommendations.title: The Drama
recommendations.overview: A happily engaged couple is put to the test when an unexpected turn sends their wedding week off the rails.

recommendations.title: Touki Bouki
recommendations.overview: Mory, a cowherd, and Anta, a university student, try to make money in order to go to Paris and leave their boring past behind.
